title: Mid-Level Node Developer
jd_text: FinFlow Solutions is hiring a Mid-Level Node Developer to enhance our automated invoicing platform. You will be responsible for developing robust backend services using Node.js and Express, focusing on accuracy and reliability. The role requires strong experience with PostgreSQL for managing complex financial transactions and Redis for session caching. We offer a salary of £52,000, a hybrid work model, and a competitive pension plan. You should be proficient in using Docker to maintain consistent environments across development and production. Experience deploying and managing services on AWS is a core requirement. You will work in an agile environment, contributing to sprint planning and participating in daily stand-ups. We are looking for someone who can take ownership of specific features and drive them from conception to deployment. You will be expected to write unit and integration tests to ensure the stability of the financial engine. Ability to optimize slow database queries and improve overall API response times is essential.

title: Principal Backend Engineer
jd_text: SkyNet Telecom is looking for a Principal Backend Engineer to lead the evolution of our network management software. You will be the technical authority for all things Node.js, designing systems that can handle massive amounts of telemetry data. You will be responsible for the selection of database technologies, utilizing both MongoDB for unstructured data and PostgreSQL for critical system configuration. We offer a salary of £95,000, executive benefits, and a fully remote working option. Expert-level knowledge of AWS and Docker is required, as you will be designing the orchestration layer for our global deployment. You will also implement Redis to ensure real-time monitoring capabilities. This is a strategic role involving the mentorship of senior engineers and the definition of the long-term technical roadmap. You will work closely with the product team to ensure that the architecture supports future business growth. The ideal candidate has a track record of building extremely scalable systems in the telecommunications or networking space. Strong leadership and communication skills are paramount.

title: Node.js Developer
jd_text: PurePath Wellness is seeking a Node.js Developer to build the backend for our holistic health app. You will be using Node.js and Express to create APIs that integrate with wearable device data. Your role will involve managing user health profiles in MongoDB and optimizing data retrieval using Redis. We offer a salary of £44,000, flexible hours, and a supportive work environment focused on wellbeing. Experience with AWS for hosting and Docker for containerization is essential. You will be responsible for ensuring that the backend is scalable as our user base grows. We are looking for a developer who is passionate about health and wellness and wants to apply their skills to a product that helps people live better lives. You will work in a small, agile team, giving you a lot of autonomy and influence over the technical direction of the product. You will be expected to implement best practices for API security and performance. Familiarity with OAuth2 and JWT for secure authentication is required.

title: Senior Backend Developer
jd_text: TradeWind Logistics is looking for a Senior Backend Developer to overhaul our shipping tracking system. You will lead the development of high-performance services using Node.js and Express, ensuring real-time updates for our global clients. The role requires deep expertise in PostgreSQL for relational data and Redis for high-speed caching of shipment status. We offer a salary of £68,000, a generous bonus scheme, and hybrid working options. You will be responsible for the migration of our legacy services to a modern Docker-based architecture on AWS. We expect you to drive engineering excellence through the implementation of automated testing and CI/CD pipelines. You will mentor junior and mid-level developers, conducting thorough code reviews and promoting a culture of continuous learning. The ideal candidate has experience with event-driven architectures and understands how to handle asynchronous data processing at scale. You will collaborate with the product team to define the API specifications and ensure they meet the needs of our logistics partners.

title: Backend Engineer
jd_text: NovaEd Tech is seeking a Backend Engineer to join our learning management system team. You will be building scalable APIs using Node.js and Express to support a growing number of online students. Your role will involve designing efficient data models in MongoDB and utilizing Redis to cache frequently accessed course content. We offer a salary of £47,000, a great pension plan, and a focus on professional development. Proficiency in Docker and AWS is required, as you will be managing the deployment of our services. We are looking for someone who is passionate about education and wants to create tools that make learning more accessible. You will work in a collaborative environment, participating in sprint planning and daily stand-ups. You will be responsible for optimizing the performance of the backend to ensure a smooth user experience even during peak traffic periods. Experience with PostgreSQL for structured reporting and analytics is a significant plus. You will be expected to write clean, documented code and contribute to our internal wiki.

title: Junior Node.js Engineer
jd_text: SparkPay is looking for a Junior Node.js Engineer to join our payments team. You will be helping us maintain and extend our transaction processing engine using Node.js and Express. Your main responsibilities will include writing API endpoints and performing basic database operations in PostgreSQL. We offer a starting salary of £33,000, a modern office in central London, and a strong mentorship program. You should have a basic understanding of how to build a server and a desire to learn about the fintech industry. We will provide training on Docker and AWS to help you become proficient in our deployment processes. You will be paired with a senior engineer who will guide you through the codebase and help you improve your coding skills. The role involves fixing bugs, writing simple tests, and developing small features. A keen eye for detail and a commitment to writing reliable code are essential for this role. Experience with Redis for basic caching is a plus but not required.

title: Lead Backend Developer
jd_text: Apex SaaS is seeking a Lead Backend Developer to drive the technical strategy for our enterprise resource planning software. You will be responsible for the architecture and delivery of our core services using Node.js and Express. The role involves managing a team of developers and ensuring the scalability of our PostgreSQL and MongoDB clusters. We provide a salary of £82,000, stock options, and a flexible remote-first policy. You will be the authority on our AWS infrastructure, overseeing the orchestration of containerized services via Docker. We are looking for a leader who can balance hands-on technical work with team management and strategic planning. You will implement Redis to optimize performance for our high-traffic tenants. The ideal candidate has a proven track record of building and scaling B2B SaaS products. You will be responsible for defining the API standards and ensuring high code quality across the team. Strong communication skills are required to collaborate with stakeholders and translate business requirements into technical specifications.

title: Backend Developer
jd_text: GreenLeaf E-comm is hiring a Backend Developer to help us scale our sustainable marketplace. You will be focusing on building robust APIs using Node.js and Express to power our store and checkout process. Your role will involve managing product and order data in MongoDB and implementing a caching layer with Redis to improve page load speeds. We offer a salary of £45,000, hybrid working, and a commitment to environmental sustainability. Experience with AWS and Docker is essential for managing our cloud-native environment. We are looking for a developer who is comfortable working in a fast-paced environment and can take ownership of their work. You will collaborate with the frontend team to ensure a seamless integration of the API. You will be responsible for writing unit tests and ensuring the stability of the backend. Experience with PostgreSQL for financial auditing is a plus. You will participate in agile ceremonies, including sprint reviews and retrospectives, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our development processes.

title: Senior Node.js Engineer
jd_text: Quantum Analytics is seeking a Senior Node.js Engineer to build the backend for our data visualization platform. You will be responsible for creating high-performance APIs using Node.js that can process and serve massive datasets. The role requires deep experience with PostgreSQL for complex analytical queries and Redis for fast data retrieval. We offer a salary of £72,000, private healthcare, and a flexible work schedule. You will lead the effort to optimize our AWS infrastructure and implement better containerization strategies using Docker. We are looking for an engineer who is passionate about performance and can identify bottlenecks in the system. You will mentor mid-level developers and drive the adoption of a more rigorous testing culture. The ideal candidate has experience with distributed systems and understands how to scale Node.js applications horizontally. You will be responsible for the design and implementation of our API versioning strategy and ensuring backward compatibility for our enterprise clients. Strong analytical skills and a data-driven approach are essential.

title: Junior Backend Developer
jd_text: HobbyHut is looking for a Junior Backend Developer to join our small, passionate team. You will be helping us build a community platform for hobbyists using Node.js and Express. Your main tasks will involve creating API endpoints and managing user data in MongoDB. We offer a starting salary of £31,000, a friendly office culture, and a great opportunity to learn. You should have a basic understanding of how to build a server and a passion for creating great user experiences. We will provide training on Docker and AWS to help you understand how our application is deployed. You will work closely with a senior developer who will provide mentorship and conduct code reviews. The role involves a mix of bug fixing and feature development. We value a curious mindset and a willingness to experiment with new ways of solving problems. Experience with Redis for simple caching is a plus. This is a perfect role for a recent graduate or someone looking to make a career change into backend development.

title: Backend Architect
jd_text: SecureNet Systems is searching for a Backend Architect to design the next generation of our security monitoring tools. This is a critical role requiring expert-level knowledge of Node.js and distributed system design. You will be responsible for architecting a system that can handle millions of events per second, utilizing both PostgreSQL for configuration and MongoDB for event storage. We offer a salary of £92,000, an executive benefits package, and a fully remote working option. You will lead the transition to a microservices architecture, utilizing Docker and AWS for orchestration and scaling. Your goal will be to ensure maximum uptime and minimal latency for our global security operations center clients. You will work closely with the product team to define the long-term technical roadmap and ensure the system can scale to meet future demands. You will be the final authority on architectural decisions and will mentor senior engineers across the organization. Experience with high-availability systems and a strong understanding of network security are essential.

title: Node.js Developer
jd_text: EcoTravel is hiring a Node.js Developer to help us build a sustainable travel planning app. You will be responsible for developing the backend services using Node.js and Express, focusing on integrating with various travel and carbon-offset APIs. The role involves managing user itineraries in MongoDB and utilizing Redis to cache search results. We provide a salary of £43,000, flexible working hours, and a travel allowance for sustainable trips. Experience with AWS and Docker is required, as you will be managing the deployment of our services. We are looking for someone who is passionate about travel and the environment and wants to build a product that encourages sustainable tourism. You will work in a collaborative, agile environment, contributing to all stages of the development process. You will be responsible for ensuring the performance and reliability of the API. Experience with PostgreSQL for complex reporting is a plus. You will participate in weekly technical discussions and help shape the future of the platform.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
jd_text: SwiftLogistics is looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to optimize our route planning engine. You will be tasked with improving the performance of our Node.js services to handle complex logistical calculations in real-time. You will utilize Redis for high-speed data access and PostgreSQL for structured route and vehicle data. We offer a salary of £67,000, a performance bonus, and a hybrid working model. Deep expertise in Node.js, specifically regarding asynchronous processing and worker threads, is essential. You will lead the effort to containerize all remaining legacy services using Docker and migrate them to a scalable AWS architecture. You will mentor mid-level developers and drive the adoption of a test-driven development approach. The ideal candidate has a strong background in developing optimization algorithms and is comfortable working with large datasets. You will be responsible for designing the API contracts and ensuring they are efficient and scalable. Strong problem-solving skills and a focus on system reliability are key to success in this role.

Experience with Docker and AWS is expected for deployment and scaling. We provide a competitive salary of £58,000, hybrid working options, and an employee wellness program. You will be instrumental in improving the accuracy and speed of our data processing pipeline.
